metadata.name: KtulueKit-W11
metadata.author: Ktulue
metadata.description: Personal W11 software stack — declarative desired state installer

packages.name: Git for Windows
packages.description: Version control system. Required by almost everything else in this stack.

packages.name: PowerShell 7
packages.description: Cross-platform PowerShell. Required for Oh My Posh profile and many post-install commands.
packages.notes: Installing PS7 while running in PS can terminate the session. Run this tool from cmd.exe or Windows Terminal if possible.

packages.name: .NET 8 SDK
packages.description: Microsoft .NET 8 development kit for building C# and F# applications.
packages.notes: Install before Visual Studio. Can behave unpredictably if VS is installed simultaneously.

packages.name: Node.js LTS
packages.description: JavaScript runtime. Required for Claude Code (npm global install) and TypeScript tooling.
packages.notes: Required by Claude Code (npm global). PATH refresh happens automatically before Tier 2 commands run.

packages.name: Python 3.12
packages.description: Python 3.12 interpreter for scripting, automation, and running Python-based tools.

packages.name: Rust (rustup)
packages.description: Rust language toolchain manager. Installs rustc, cargo, and keeps them updated.

packages.name: Go
packages.description: The Go programming language runtime and compiler. Used to build KtulueKit itself.

packages.name: Visual Studio 2022 Community
packages.description: Full-featured IDE for C#/.NET development. Large install — takes 10-20 minutes.
packages.notes: Large install — extended timeout. May request reboot. Install .NET SDK first.

packages.name: DBeaver Community
packages.description: Universal database client supporting SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MySQL, and more.

packages.name: 7-Zip
packages.description: High-compression archive tool. Handles .zip, .7z, .rar, .tar and many others.

packages.name: Everything (voidtools)
packages.description: Instant file search for Windows. Indexes the entire drive in seconds.

packages.name: PowerToys
packages.description: Microsoft utility suite: FancyZones, PowerRename, Color Picker, Keyboard Manager, and more.

packages.name: ShareX
packages.description: Open-source screenshot and screen recording tool with annotation and upload features.

packages.name: Bitwarden
packages.description: Open-source password manager. Syncs across devices with end-to-end encryption.

packages.name: Oh My Posh
packages.description: Prompt theme engine for any shell. Makes your terminal look great and shows git status.
packages.notes: Required by Nerd Fonts command in Tier 2.

packages.name: GIMP
packages.description: Free open-source image editor. Photoshop alternative for raster graphics and photo editing.

packages.name: Inkscape
packages.description: Free vector graphics editor. Illustrator alternative for logos, icons, and scalable artwork.

packages.name: Krita
packages.description: Professional digital painting app. Excellent for concept art, illustration, and animation.

packages.name: Tiled
packages.description: 2D tile map editor. Used for level design in 2D games (works with DragonRuby and others).

packages.name: Audacity
packages.description: Free audio editor and recorder. Great for editing voice recordings, music, and sound effects.

packages.name: LMMS
packages.description: Free open-source digital audio workstation. Make beats and compose music.

packages.name: HandBrake
packages.description: Open-source video transcoder. Converts video files between formats and compresses them.

packages.name: VLC
packages.description: Universal media player. Plays virtually any video or audio format without extra codecs.

packages.name: Kdenlive
packages.description: Free open-source video editor. Multi-track timeline editor for producing videos.

packages.name: RustDesk
packages.description: Open-source remote desktop software. TeamViewer/AnyDesk alternative, self-hostable.

packages.name: WireGuard
packages.description: Fast, modern VPN protocol. Simpler and more performant than OpenVPN or IPSec.

packages.name: Bambu Studio
packages.description: Slicer software for Bambu Lab 3D printers. Converts 3D models to print instructions.

packages.name: FreeCAD
packages.description: Open-source parametric 3D CAD modeller. Design mechanical parts and assemblies.

packages.name: OpenSCAD
packages.description: Script-based 3D CAD tool. Define 3D shapes with code — great for precise geometric models.

packages.name: Blender
packages.description: Free open-source 3D creation suite. Modelling, rigging, animation, rendering, and VFX.

packages.name: GnuCash
packages.description: Free accounting software. Double-entry bookkeeping for personal and small business finance.

packages.name: Plex Desktop
packages.description: Desktop client for your Plex Media Server. Stream your personal media library.

packages.name: Calibre
packages.description: E-book management and conversion tool. Manages your library and converts between formats.

packages.name: BleachBit
packages.description: Disk cleanup tool. Removes cache, logs, and temp files to free up space.

packages.name: Notepad++
packages.description: Lightweight source code editor with syntax highlighting. Great for quick file edits.
packages.notes: Already installed. Pre-check will skip or upgrade.

packages.name: Firefox
packages.description: Open-source web browser from Mozilla. Privacy-focused with excellent extension support.
packages.notes: Already installed. Pre-check will skip or upgrade.

packages.name: LibreOffice
packages.description: Free open-source office suite. Word processor, spreadsheet, and presentation software.
packages.notes: Already installed. Pre-check will skip or upgrade.

packages.name: SourceTree
packages.description: Free Git GUI client by Atlassian. Visual branch management and commit history.
packages.notes: Already installed. Pre-check will skip or upgrade.

packages.name: VS Code
packages.description: Lightweight but powerful code editor. The primary editor for this dev stack.
packages.notes: Already installed. Pre-check will skip or upgrade.

packages.name: Steam
packages.description: Valve's game distribution platform. Manages your PC game library and updates.
packages.notes: Already installed. Pre-check will skip or upgrade.

packages.name: Discord
packages.description: Voice, video, and text chat app popular with gaming and developer communities.
packages.notes: Already installed. Pre-check will skip or upgrade.

packages.name: Spotify
packages.description: Music and podcast streaming service. Requires user-scope install on Windows.
packages.notes: Already installed. Scope 'user' required — Spotify's installer fails under admin scope.

packages.name: OBS Studio
packages.description: Free and open-source software for video recording and live streaming.
packages.notes: Already installed. Pre-check will skip or upgrade.

packages.name: Brave Browser
packages.description: Privacy-focused browser with built-in ad blocker and Chromium-based extension support.
packages.notes: Already installed. Pre-check will skip or upgrade.

packages.name: Postman
packages.description: API development and testing platform. Build, test, and document REST and GraphQL APIs.

packages.name: GitHub CLI
packages.description: Official GitHub CLI. Manage repos, PRs, issues, and Actions from the terminal.
packages.notes: Authentication (gh auth login) handled separately in KtulueKit-Migration or by the user post-install.

packages.name: Claude Desktop
packages.description: Anthropic's desktop app for Claude. Includes background task support and MCP server integration.
packages.notes: Claude desktop app — includes Claude Cowork for background tasks.

packages.name: Pencil Desktop
packages.description: Agent-driven MCP design canvas. Design on a visual canvas that lands directly in your codebase.
packages.notes: Agent-driven MCP design canvas that lives in your codebase. Design on canvas, land in code. From pencil.dev.

commands.name: Claude Code
commands.description: Claude Code CLI — AI-powered terminal assistant from Anthropic. Requires Node.js.
commands.notes: Requires Node.js. npm must be on PATH.

commands.name: Nerd Fonts (CaskaydiaCove)
commands.description: Installs CaskaydiaCove Nerd Font — required for Oh My Posh glyphs in the terminal.
commands.notes: Requires Oh My Posh to be installed and on PATH.

commands.name: WSL2 (Ubuntu)
commands.description: Windows Subsystem for Linux 2 with Ubuntu. Enables running Linux tools natively.
commands.notes: Requires a reboot before WSL2 is usable. Tool will prompt after this step.

commands.name: DragonRuby GTK
commands.description: Opens your itch.io library to download DragonRuby GTK (requires lifetime license purchase).
commands.notes: Lifetime license via itch.io. Tool opens your itch.io library — download and install DragonRuby GTK manually from there.

commands.name: MeshMixer
commands.description: Opens the MeshMixer download page. Free 3D mesh editing and sculpting tool.
commands.notes: Direct download. Tool opens the download page.

commands.name: Aseprite
commands.description: Opens the Aseprite Steam page. Pixel art and animation tool (purchase and install via Steam).
commands.notes: Purchase and install via Steam. Tool opens the Steam store page — you must buy and install it from there.

commands.name: Plexamp
commands.description: Opens the Plexamp download page. Beautiful music player for your Plex library.
commands.notes: Direct download from plex.tv.

commands.name: Hype Control
commands.description: Opens the HypeControl GitHub repo. Your personal Twitch chat Chrome extension.
commands.notes: Not yet on Chrome Web Store. Opens GitHub repo — load as unpacked extension manually. Move to extensions[] with store ID once published.

commands.name: Claude Ruby Marketplace
commands.description: Opens the Claude Ruby Marketplace GitHub repo.
commands.notes: Opens GitHub repo for review and manual install.

commands.name: Peon Ping
commands.description: Installs Peon Ping via git clone. Chat-based task manager integrated with Claude.
commands.command: git clone https://github.com/PeonPing/peon-ping && cd peon-ping && bash install.sh
commands.on_failure_prompt:
1. Open an admin PowerShell window
2. Run: git clone https://github.com/PeonPing/peon-ping
3. Run: cd peon-ping
4. Run: bash install.sh (or bash peon.sh if install.sh is not found)
5. Follow any prompts in the installer
6. Verify the install completed before pressing Enter.
commands.notes: Requires Python and Git. Clones repo and runs install.sh via bash. Falls back to manual guidance if it fails.

commands.name: DragonRuby Control
commands.description: Opens the DragonRuby Control GitHub repo.
commands.notes: Opens GitHub repo for review and manual install.

commands.name: Elgato Stream Deck
commands.description: Tracks Elgato Stream Deck in desired state. Download manually from elgato.com.
commands.command: echo Already installed — no automated installer
commands.notes: Elgato Stream Deck software. Tracks desired state in summary only. Download: https://www.elgato.com/downloads

commands.name: Streamer.bot
commands.description: Tracks Streamer.bot in desired state. Download manually from streamer.bot.
commands.command: echo Already installed — no automated installer
commands.notes: Streamer.bot automation software. Tracks desired state in summary only. Download: https://streamer.bot

commands.name: DaVinci Resolve
commands.description: Tracks DaVinci Resolve in desired state. Free professional video editor — download from Blackmagic.
commands.command: echo Already installed — no automated installer
commands.notes: Blackmagic DaVinci Resolve. Tracks desired state in summary only. Download: https://www.blackmagicdesign.com/products/davinciresolve

commands.name: Git: core.editor
commands.description: Sets VS Code as the default editor for git commit messages and interactive rebase.
commands.notes: Sets VS Code as the default git editor for commit messages and interactive rebase.

commands.name: Git: credential.helper
commands.description: Enables Git Credential Manager to store GitHub/Azure credentials securely.
commands.notes: Enables Git Credential Manager to store credentials securely.

commands.name: PowerShell Profile: Oh My Posh
commands.description: Adds Oh My Posh init to your PowerShell 7 profile for a styled prompt.
commands.check: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path $PROFILE) { if (Select-String 'oh-my-posh' $PROFILE -Quiet) { exit 0 } else { exit 1 } } else { exit 1 }"
commands.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "if (!(Test-Path $PROFILE)) { New-Item -Path $PROFILE -Type File -Force }; if (!(Select-String 'oh-my-posh' $PROFILE -Quiet -EA SilentlyContinue)) { Add-Content $PROFILE 'oh-my-posh init pwsh | Invoke-Expression' }"
commands.notes: Appends 'oh-my-posh init pwsh | Invoke-Expression' to the PS7 $PROFILE. Idempotent — skips if already present.

commands.name: Windows Terminal: CaskaydiaCove Font
commands.description: Sets CaskaydiaCove Nerd Font as the default in Windows Terminal (for Oh My Posh glyphs).
commands.notes: Sets CaskaydiaCove Nerd Font as the default in Windows Terminal (Store version). Required for Oh My Posh glyphs to render correctly.

commands.name: npm: TypeScript
commands.description: Installs TypeScript compiler globally via npm.
commands.notes: Global TypeScript compiler.

commands.name: npm: Prettier
commands.description: Installs Prettier code formatter globally via npm.
commands.notes: Global Prettier code formatter.

commands.name: pip: pipx
commands.description: Installs pipx — the recommended way to install Python CLI tools in isolated environments.
commands.command: python -m pip install --user pipx && python -m pipx ensurepath
commands.notes: Installs pipx for isolated Python CLI tool environments.

commands.name: pip: black
commands.description: Installs Black Python formatter via pipx.
commands.notes: Python code formatter via pipx.

commands.name: pip: ruff
commands.description: Installs Ruff Python linter via pipx. Much faster than flake8 or pylint.
commands.notes: Fast Python linter via pipx.

commands.name: VS Code: Go
commands.description: Official Go extension for VS Code (syntax highlighting, IntelliSense, debugging).
commands.notes: Official Go extension (syntax, debugging, go tools).

commands.name: VS Code: Python
commands.description: Official Python extension for VS Code (IntelliSense, linting, debugging).
commands.notes: Official Python extension (IntelliSense, debugging, linting).

commands.name: VS Code: ESLint
commands.description: ESLint integration for VS Code — shows linting errors inline.
commands.notes: ESLint integration for VS Code.

commands.name: VS Code: Prettier
commands.description: Prettier formatter integration for VS Code.
commands.notes: Prettier formatter integration for VS Code.

commands.name: VS Code: GitLens
commands.description: GitLens for VS Code — inline git blame, history, and branch visualisation.
commands.notes: Git blame, history, and visualization supercharged.

commands.name: VS Code: C#
commands.description: Official C# extension for VS Code. Complements .NET 8 SDK.
commands.notes: Official C# extension. Complements .NET 8 SDK and VS 2022.

commands.name: Windows: Show File Extensions
commands.description: Makes Windows Explorer show file extensions (e.g. .exe, .json) instead of hiding them.
commands.notes: Disables hiding known file extensions in Explorer.

commands.name: Windows: Show Hidden Files
commands.description: Makes Windows Explorer show hidden files and folders.
commands.notes: Enables showing hidden files and folders in Explorer.

commands.name: Windows: Developer Mode
commands.description: Enables Windows Developer Mode — required for symlinks without admin and app sideloading.
commands.notes: Enables Developer Mode. Required for symlinks without admin, sideloading apps. Requires running as admin.

commands.name: Windows: Dark Mode
commands.description: Switches Windows and app themes to dark mode.
commands.command: reg add "HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Themes\Personalize" /v AppsUseLightTheme /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /f && reg add "HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Themes\Personalize" /v SystemUsesLightTheme /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /f
commands.notes: Enables dark mode for both apps and system UI.
